headline: Famous credit card company buys pizza using crypto
summary: The history of digital assets is famously topped with pepperoni. On May 22, 2010, a developer named Laszlo Hanyecz made the first commercial Bitcoin transaction by trading 10,000 BTC for two Papa John’s pizzas. At the time, those coins were worth about $41. Today, as Bitcoin hits record ...
